arts.sum: Here are our Germany player ratings for Tuesday's UEFA Nations League clash with Hungary.

arts.ttl: Nagelsmann after Hungary draw: "I don't want to talk about the game"
arts.sum: Germany drew 1-1 with Hungary on Tuesday night in the Nations League in Budapest following Dominik Szoboszlai's late penalty. Julian Nagelsmann was not pleased with the penalty decision or his side's performance.

arts.ttl: Hungary 1-1 Germany: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Dominik Szoboszlai nets late penalty
arts.sum: Hungary's Dominik Szoboszlai scores a late penalty to rescue a point from Tuesday's UEFA Nations League clash with Germany.

arts.ttl: Germany denied by last-chance penalty for Hungary in Nations League. Sweden's Gyökeres scores 4
arts.sum: Dominik Szoboszlai scored a penalty in the ninth minute of stoppage time to deny Germany a victorious end to the Nations League group stage and show why Hungary is one of the hardest places to win in world soccer. After a video review, Szoboszlai stepped up to take the penalty and chipped it over goalkeeper Alexander Nübel to salvage a 1-1 draw for Hungary, which ends Group A3 third of four teams.

arts.ttl: Andrich after Hungary penalty draw: "Where should his hand go?"
arts.sum: Robert Andrich spoke out about Hungary's controversial penalty equaliser in extra time of the second half in their 1-1 draw with Germany in the Nations League. Scorer Felix Nmecha also commented on this decision.

arts.ttl: Hungary deny much-changed Germany victory with stoppage-time penalty goal
arts.sum: A much-changed Germany side had to settle for a 1-1 draw with Hungary after Dominik Szoboszlai converted a penalty in stoppage time.

arts.ttl: Can Tim Kleindienst be Germany's new regular centre-forward?
arts.sum: Tim Kleindienst netted his first goals for Germany in a 7-0 thrashing of Bosnia and Herzegovina, marking the latest step in a long progression for a career mostly spent below the Bundesliga. The third tier of German football is where it all began for Kleindienst as a 19-year-old scoring 13 goals for Energie Cottbus in his breakout season of 2014/15.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa and Newcastle eyeing 'complete' £25m defensive talent likened to Antonio Rudiger
Germany U21s conclude undefeated calendar year with draw in France
arts.sum: Antonio di Salvo's Germany U21s have once again blown a late lead, but managed to keep an impressive unbeaten run going with a 2-2 draw against France in Valenciennes on Tuesday evening.
The lineups for Tuesday's UEFA Nations League clash between Hungary and Germany have been announced.
